currently.label: Currently
currently.value: Exploring Spring Boot 4 + Kotlin coroutines · Learning German

paragraphs: Full Stack Developer who came to engineering after sixteen years of management and government work. I bring the operational rigor of running organizations to the way I build software: clear thinking, attention to detail, and care for the people who use the result.

I work across the stack — Kotlin and Spring Boot on the backend, React and TypeScript on the frontend, Android with Jetpack Compose on mobile. I also build with modern AI tooling: Claude and OpenAI APIs, MCP servers, RAG pipelines.
Continuous learner — currently focused on Spring Boot 4, Kotlin coroutines, and improving my German.

approach.label: Approach
approach.value: Proactive · High organization · Attentive to details

skills.intro: Tech I use day to day. Grouped by domain, marked by depth.

projects.intro: A selection of work — early collaborations from GoIT, with newer projects to follow.

wallet.title: Wallet
wallet.description: Personal finance tracker built with React and Node.js as a four-person team. Categorised transactions, budgeting, and a balance overview.

phonebook.title: Phonebook
phonebook.description: Contacts app with auth, filtering, and persistent storage. React, Redux Toolkit, Formik, deployed on Netlify.

filmoteka.title: Filmoteka
filmoteka.description: Movie discovery and watchlist app powered by the TMDB API. Six-person team — responsible for state management and search.

hellen-english.title: Hellen English
hellen-english.description: Landing page for an English-learning service. Fully responsive, mobile-first markup with SCSS architecture.

experience.intro: A non-linear path. Sixteen years of leadership before software — that lens stays with me.

dev-current.title: Software Developer
dev-current.subtitle: Progeek GmbH
bullets: Build production systems with Spring Boot + Kotlin on the backend and React on the frontend.
Design and ship REST APIs — schema, versioning, contract clarity for downstream teams.
Build lightweight services with Hono where Node.js / edge runtimes are the right fit.
Integrate LLM APIs (Claude, OpenAI), MCP servers, and RAG pipelines into product workflows.

goit.title: Full Stack Developer training
goit.subtitle: GoIT Academy
bullets: Completed Full Stack curriculum: HTML/CSS, JavaScript, React, Node.js, REST APIs.
Three team projects with role rotation — IC, reviewer, project coordinator.

business.title: Founder
business.subtitle: Private business
bullets: Founded and ran a private business end to end.
Operations, finance, hiring, and team management.

public-service.title: Public service & leadership
public-service.subtitle: Government / state enterprises
bullets: Twelve years in central government bodies (ministries) and state-owned enterprises.
Leadership positions managing small and large teams across multiple functions.
Built operational discipline I now apply to engineering work.
